# Avenir Admissions
> Expert college admissions consulting led by Aiden Kjeldsen, M.S.Ed., UCLA Certified College Counselor.

## Business
- Name: Avenir Admissions
- Owner: Aiden Kjeldsen, M.S.Ed., UCLA Certified College Counselor
- Phone: (707) 347-9477
- Website: https://aveniradmissions.com
- Service area: United States

## What We Do
Avenir Admissions provides personalized, data-driven college admissions consulting for high school students (9th–12th grade), transfer students, and international students. We help students build strong academic profiles, craft compelling essays, and navigate the full college application process with clarity and confidence.

## Services
- 9th Grade: Course selection, study habits, long-term college planning
- 10th Grade: Extracurricular leadership, career exploration, standardized test timelines
- 11th Grade: College list building, SAT/ACT prep, scholarship research, essay brainstorming
- 12th Grade: Application strategy (EA/ED/RD), essay coaching, mock interviews, final decision support
- Transfer Students: Transfer-friendly college identification, essays, credit transfer guidance
- International Students: U.S. admissions navigation, English proficiency tests, visa and housing advice

## Blog — The College Corner
Expert articles on college admissions strategy, application tips, and school-specific guides.

Topics covered:
- Early Action vs Early Decision
- UC Schools admissions guide
- UC Davis campus life
- Must-do tasks for high school seniors
- SAT vs ACT comparison
- Stanford University admissions guide
- How to write the best college essay
- UC admissions 2025 winning application guide
- Harvard admissions guide
- Columbia admissions guide
- How to get into Cornell
- How to get into UPenn
- How to get into Dartmouth
